userProfile.title: UserProfile
userProfile.description: User account schema representing farmers, experts, and administrators in the system.

uid.description: The unique Firebase Auth UID of the user.

displayName.description: Human-readable display name of the user.

email.description: Verified email address of the authenticated user.

role.description: System privilege role assigned to user.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the user profile was created.

feedback.title: Feedback
feedback.description: Community user submission feedback containing crop health reviews, with like counts, and admin certifications.

id.description: Unique identifier of the feedback submission.

userId.description: User UID of the feedback author.

userEmail.description: Email of the author for admin review.

text.description: Text description of feedback or question.

likes.description: List of user UIDs who have liked this feedback.

adminLikes.description: List of administrator UIDs who have liked this, which triggers username highlight.

diagnosis.title: Diagnosis
diagnosis.description: Durable record of a CNN plant scan result.

imageUrl.description: Base64 encoded or hosted image of the crop.

/users/{userId}.description: Stores user profiles with secure role information.

/feedbacks/{feedbackId}.description: Community feedback submissions accessible globally to authenticated participants.

/diagnostics/{diagnosisId}.description: Historical diagnosis records indexed by user ID for persistent cloud tracking.
